## What this changes

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Data correction
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited `app/lab.template.html` (not `lab.built.html`) and ran `npm run build`
- [ ] If I touched the engine, `app/optimizer.mjs` and `src/engine/optimizer.mjs` are in sync
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (engine tests)
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes (or I explain why it can't run locally)
- [ ] For UI changes: checked desktop and mobile widths, still keyboard and screen-reader usable

<!-- Screenshots for UI changes, or anything a reviewer should know. -->
